ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* The stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* The full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "last_price" REAL /* The last recorded price of the stock */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* The change in the stock price from the previous close */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* The percentage change in the stock price from the previous close */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* The date and time the stock price was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "watchlist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchlist */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the company was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the alert is for */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the news is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time the news was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
